text:

Log:
  Update to 1.8.2

  Remove the now unneeded post-patch section
  Enforce usage of our INSTALL_PROGRAM instead of manually strip
  Pass variables via MAKE_ARGS to avoid patching
  Remove now useless USES=pathfix
